headline: MTUM Owns the Winners, but July Could Turn Into a Momentum Bloodbath
summary: Momentum investing sounds like a physics law and behaves like a mood ring. The iShares MSCI USA Momentum Factor ETF (BATS:MTUM) has ridden the AI-chip surge to a 29% year-to-date gain through July 6, but the fund just took its worst weekly hit of the year, dropping nearly 7% in the seven days ending July ... MTUM Owns the Winners, but July Could Turn Into a Momentum Bloodbath

headline: Jeff Bezos Is Pouring Money Into a Startup That Could Drive ‘Civilizational Wealth’
summary: The world’s richest investor is making an unprecedented all-in bet on artificial intelligence. In June alone, Bezos Expeditions, Jeff Bezos’ 21-year-old family office, made five direct investments in AI startups, accounting for 10% of all family office dealmaking that month, per Fintrx. Bezos Expeditions is now the most active family office investor of 2026 with ... Jeff Bezos Is Pouring Money Into a Startup That Could Drive ‘Civilizational Wealth’

headline: Wall Street Got the Weak Jobs Report It Wanted. Chip Stocks Wrecked the Rally Anyway.
summary: Thursday's jobs report came in far below forecasts, initially easing pressure on the Federal Reserve, before a fresh slide in memory and semiconductor stocks dragged the Nasdaq lower even as the Dow closed at a record. Tesla sold off despite its best delivery quarter in years, healthcare names caught a bid, and SK Hynix lined up what would be the largest US listing ever by a foreign company.
